title: Differdange, Esch-sur-Alzette Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Differdange, Esch-sur-Alzette Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Differdange is a city in Esch-sur-Alzette Canton with a population of 28,641. A historic steel town in southern Luxembourg, home to Miami University’s Luxembourg campus and a growing multicultural community.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
